America's Coco Gauff won the women's singles title a year ago thanks to a 7-6, 2-6, 4-6 victory over Belarus' Aryna Sabalenka in the final. Gauff beat the likes of Lois Boisson, Ekaterina Alexandrova and fellow American Madison Keys to reach the showpiece, while Sabalenka beat Iga Swiatek, Elina Svitolina and Amanda Anisimova to set up the clash with Gauff.

Spain's Carlos Alcaraz won the men's singles title here 12 months ago after beating Jannik Sinner in a thrilling final. Sinner had taken the first two sets before Alcaraz fought back to eventually win the showpiece 6-4, 7-6, 4-6, 6-7, 6-7 in a game that lasted just short of five and a half hours.

Oliver Glasner's side are playing in their first ever European final after their first season in European football. The South London club beat Shakhtar Donetsk 5-2 across their two semi-final ties thanks to a 3-1 victory away from home, before winning 2-1 at home seven days later. Their Spanish opponents progressed thanks to a 2-0 aggregate victory that saw them win both ties 1-0.

TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.title: Live Test Cricket
TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.subtitle: Ireland v New Zealand-Only Test, Day One
TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.description: Ireland v New Zealand. Coverage of the first day of the one-off Test from Civil Service Cricket Club in Stormont, Belfast. This is just the third Test match to be played in Ireland and just the 13th game that they have played in history. The host's last victory in this format at home came in July 2024 when they beat Zimbabwe by four wickets, in a nervy game that saw them chase down 157 to earn them their first win on home soil since 2018.

TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.title: Live: Roland Garros 360
TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.subtitle: Day 1-Day Session
TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.description: Coverage from around the courts on day one of the Grand Slam tournament, featuring first-round matches at Stade Roland Garros in Paris. America's Coco Gauff won the women's singles title a year ago thanks to a 7-6, 2-6, 4-6 victory over Belarus' Aryna Sabalenka in the final. Gauff beat the likes of Lois Boisson, Ekaterina Alexandrova and fellow American Madison Keys to reach the showpiece, while Sabalenka beat Iga Swiatek, Elina Svitolina and Amanda Anisimova to set up the clash with Gauff.

TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.description: Coverage from around the courts on day four of the Grand Slam tournament at Stade Roland Garros in Paris, featuring the opening second-round matches. America's Chris Evert has won the women's singles title the most times in history at this tournament after claiming seven victories between 1974 and 1986. Both Belgium's Justine Henin and Poland's Iga Swiatek are two titles behind Evert after both winning this event four times since the turn of the century.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Award-winning program anchored by David Muir, featuring unforgettable, character-driven true crime mysteries, exclusive newsmaker interviews, hard-hitting investigative reports and in-depth coverage of high profile stories.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: What Would You Do?
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Thirty years after the defeat of the Galactic Empire, the galaxy faces a new threat from the evil Kylo Ren (Adam Driver) and the First Order. ABC.National.Feed.us2.subtitle: Part 2: Talked to Death
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: By the mid-'90s, daytime talk shows had earned the name "Trash TV," with many guests willing to air their dirty laundry on national TV; with ratings spiking, the shows began pushing the envelope -- and its guests -- to extremes.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Brilliant parapsychologist Elise Rainier receives a disturbing phone call from a man who claims that his house is haunted. Even more disturbing is the address -- 413 Apple Tree Lane in Five Keys, N.M. -- the home where Elise grew up as a child. Accompanied by her two investigative partners, Rainier travels to Five Keys to confront and destroy her greatest fear -- the demon that she accidentally set free years earlier.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Insidious
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A family looks to prevent evil spirits from trapping their comatose child in a realm called The Further.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Insidious: The Red Door
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Josh Lambert heads east to drop his son, Dalton, off at school. However, Dalton's college dream soon becomes a living nightmare when the repressed demons of his past suddenly return to haunt them both.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Curse of La Llorona
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In the 1970s Los Angeles, the legendary ghost La Llorona is stalking the night -- and the children. Ignoring the eerie warning of a troubled mother, a social worker and her own kids are drawn into a frightening supernatural realm. Their only hope of surviving La Llorona's deadly wrath is a disillusioned priest who practices mysticism to keep evil at bay.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Mummy
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The Mummy is a rousing, suspenseful and horrifying epic about an expedition of treasure-seeking explorers in the Sahara Desert in 1925. Stumbling upon an ancient tomb, the hunters unwittingly set loose a 3,000-year-old legacy of terror, which is embodied in the vengeful reincarnation of an Egyptian priest who had been sentenced to an eternity as one of the living dead.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Mummy Returns
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Ten years after the events of the first film, Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are settled in 1935 London, where they are raising their son. When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Cursed by a devious sorceress, China's ruthless Dragon Emperor (Jet Li) and his vast army lie buried in clay for millennia. When young archaeologist Alex O'Connell is tricked into reviving the emperor, he and his famous parents (Brendan Fraser, Maria Bello) must find a way to send the ghoul back to the grave before he can awaken his vast army and take over the world.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Twilight
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: High-school student Bella Swan, always a bit of a misfit, doesn't expect life to change much when she moves from sunny Arizona to rainy Washington state. Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Danger once again surrounds Bella, as a string of mysterious killings terrorizes Seattle and a malicious vampire continues her infernal quest for revenge. Amid the tumult, Bella must choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision may ignite the long-simmering feud between vampire and werewolf.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Bella awakes, as a vampire, from her life-threatening labor, and her newborn daughter, Renesmee, proves to be very special indeed. While Bella adjusts to her new state of being, Renesmee experiences accelerated growth. When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. Bella, Edward and the rest of the clan seek help from allies around the world to protect their family.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Bride of Frankenstein
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Curse of Frankenstein
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Victor Frankenstein is a brilliant scientist willing to stop at nothing in his quest to reanimate a deceased body. After alienating his longtime friend and partner, Paul Krempe, with his extreme methods, Frankenstein assembles a hideous creature out of dead body parts and succeeds in bringing it to life. But the monster is not as obedient or docile as Frankenstein expected, and it runs amok, resulting in murder and mayhem.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Frankenstein 1970

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein

Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

But even these battle-hardened marines with all the latest weaponry are no match for the hundreds of aliens that have invaded the colony.

As the countdown to the global apocalypse approaches zero, their incredible trek culminates in a desperate, last-minute flight to a possible safe haven.

HBO.West.us2.title: Greenland 2: Migration
HBO.West.us2.description: In the aftermath of a comet strike that decimated most of the planet, the Garrity family must leave the safety of their Greenland bunker to traverse a shattered world in search of a new home.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Switch
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Neurotic Wally Mars has one bright spot in his life: his friendship with Kassie. When Kassie announces her intention to become pregnant using a sperm donor, Wally thinks he will be the lucky guy, but Kassie has someone else in mind. While drunk at Kassie's insemination party, Wally substitutes his sperm for the donor's, then passes out, remembering nothing. Seven years later, Wally meets Kassie's son, who seems oddly familiar to him.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Table 19
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ex-maid of honor Eloise - having been relieved of her duties after being unceremoniously dumped by the best man via text - decides to hold her head high and attend her oldest friend's wedding anyway. She finds herself seated at the random table in the back of the ballroom with a disparate group of strangers, most of whom should have known to just send regrets. As everyone's secrets are revealed, Eloise learns a thing or two from the denizens of Table 19.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Lil Rel Howery: Live in Crenshaw
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Known for his storytelling and impressions of the many characters he encounters in life, Lil Rel Howery draws on his personal experiences and discusses topics such as returning to his hometown of Chicago for his uncle's funeral.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Eddington
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Nobody Spook It

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Songs for Raisa

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comedian and podcaster Marc Maron performs a standup act; he offers his nuanced perspective on our increasingly uncertain world.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Shadows
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A high school student exploring her independence on homecoming night is disrupted by her older brother and the shadows of their past.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Materialists
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: One Battle After Another
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Sex and the City 2
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Fun, fashion and friendship continue to define the lives of Carrie, Samantha, Charlotte and Miranda. They have more than they ever wished for, but when the combination of marriage and motherhood approach, the gals take an exotic vacation in Abu Dhabi. The sun-drenched paradise holds many surprises -- especially for Carrie, who faces temptation when she unexpectedly runs into Aidan.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Crazy Rich Asians
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Rachel Chu is happy to accompany her longtime boyfriend, Nick, to his best friend's wedding in Singapore. She's also surprised to learn that Nick's family is extremely wealthy, and he's considered one of the country's most eligible bachelors. Thrust into the spotlight, Rachel must now contend with jealous socialites, quirky relatives and something far, far worse -- Nick's disapproving mother.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Lobster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Barbie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

With her 30th birthday looming and being forced to re-enter the New York City dating scene, she feels adrift in a cold world. She leans on her friends (Zoe Lister-Jones, Hamish Linklater) for support but, after a series of romantic humiliations, professional blunders and boozy antics, Lola realizes that she alone is in charge of her fate.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Feeling lonely and isolated, Wilson (Woody Harrelson) tracks down Pippa (Laura Dern), the ex-wife who left him 17 years earlier. She tells the neurotic and middle-aged misanthrope that he is the father of a teenager named Claire (Isabella Amara). Shocked, excited and hopeful, Wilson embarks on a madcap quest to connect with the daughter he never knew he had.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Valerie Cherish
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Urged by NuNet to make a public statement in defense of AI, Valerie contemplates her future with or without How's That?!

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Scrat's continuous pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) when the continents split apart. The continental crack-up separates Manny and his friends from the rest of the herd, including Manny's mate, Ellie (Jennifer Lopez) and rebellious daughter Peaches (Keke Palmer). The pals are desperate to return home, but a pirate (Peter Dinklage) and his ragtag crew stand in their way.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Young Greg Heffley is looking forward to a long summer of just hanging out, but his mother throws a monkey wrench into his plans when she forces the entire family to take a road trip for a relative's birthday celebration. His eyes soon light up after he realizes that the excursion is his ticket to a gaming convention to meet YouTube sensation Mac Digby. Greg's imagination then kicks into overdrive as he sneakily hatches a scheme to attend the expo and gain some much-deserved fame.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: It's summer, and Greg Heffley (Zachary Gordon) is looking forward to playing video games and spending time with his friends. However, Greg's dad (Steve Zahn) has other plans: He's decided that some father-son bonding time is in order. Desperate to prevent his dad from ruining summer vacation, Greg pretends he has a job at a ritzy country club. But Greg's plan backfires, leaving him in the middle of embarrassing mishaps and a camping trip gone wrong.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Puss in Boots
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Long before meeting Shrek, Puss in Boots, just named a hero for saving a woman from a charging bull, is run out of town on suspicion of bank robbery, even though the real villain is Puss' friend, Humpty Dumpty. Though there is still animosity between them, Puss and Humpty reunite to steal a goose that lays golden eggs. Joining them for the adventure of nine lifetimes is notorious cat burglar, Kitty Softpaws.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. However, a dangerous villain threatens Po's awesome new life with plans to use a secret weapon to wipe out the martial art and conquer China. In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Boys Go to Jupiter
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Billy 5000, a teenage gig worker with a rise-and-grind mindset, aims to make $5,000. His quest is derailed by a gelatinous alien's appearance.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Prancer: A Christmas Tale
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ten-year-old Gloria and her recently widowed grandfather Bud befriend a mysterious reindeer when the family gathers for Christmas. Bud comes to believe that Prancer may actually be magical, but Gloria fears his theory will send him straight to a retirement home. They try to keep the secret while figuring out why the reindeer has appeared, and longstanding rifts within the family are healed along the way.

Hosts Sara Gore and George Oliphant (who also rescues homeowners' renovation projects on sister show "George to the Rescue," which began as a segment of "Open House" before becoming a stand-alone show) showcase some of the hottest homes on the market in major cities, get interior design tips from experts and provide information on what people need to know about stylish living.

TBS.HD.us2.description: When a long-missing page from the diary of assassin John Wilkes Booth suddenly resurfaces, it implicates the great-great-grandfather of treasure hunter Ben Gates (Nicolas Cage) as a conspirator in Lincoln's death. TBS.HD.us2.title: National Treasure
TBS.HD.us2.description: Historian and code-breaker Ben Gates (Nicolas Cage) has been searching his whole life for a rumored treasure dating back to the creation of the United States. Joining an expedition led by fellow treasure hunter Ian Howe (Sean Bean), Gates finds an ice-locked Colonial ship in the Arctic Circle that contains a clue linking the treasure to the Declaration of Independence. But when Howe betrays him, Gates has to race to get to the document ahead of his so-called colleague.

However, only Andy knows he didn't commit the crimes. While there, he forms a friendship with Red (Morgan Freeman), experiences brutality of prison life, adapts, helps the warden, etc., all in 19 years.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Air Force One
AMC.HD.us2.description: After making a speech in Moscow vowing to never negotiate with terrorists, President James Marshall boards Air Force One with his family and advisers. When a group of terrorists led by Ivan Korshunov hijacks the flight, the President's principles are put to the test. Feigning escape, ex-solider Marshall stows away in the aircraft and must race against time to rescue his family and everyone else on board.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Red
AMC.HD.us2.description: After surviving an assault from a squad of hit men, retired CIA agent Frank Moses (Bruce Willis) reassembles his old team for an all-out war. Frank reunites with old Joe (Morgan Freeman), crazy Marvin (John Malkovich) and wily Victoria (Helen Mirren) to uncover a massive conspiracy that threatens their lives. Only their expert training will allow them to survive a near-impossible mission -- breaking into CIA headquarters.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Red 2
AMC.HD.us2.description: Former CIA black-ops agent Frank Moses (Bruce Willis) and his old partner, Marvin Boggs (John Malkovich), are caught in the grip of retirement -- but that soon changes when a powerful Cold War weapon known as Nightshade resurfaces decades after its disappearance. With assassins hot on their trail, Frank and his team set out to find the one scientist (Anthony Hopkins) who can unravel the mystery of Nightshade and help them save themselves -- and the world.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Dark Knight Rises
AMC.HD.us2.description: It has been eight years since Batman (Christian Bale), in collusion with Commissioner Gordon (Gary Oldman), vanished into the night. Assuming responsibility for the death of Harvey Dent, Batman sacrificed everything for what he and Gordon hoped would be the greater good. However, the arrival of a cunning cat burglar (Anne Hathaway) and a merciless terrorist named Bane (Tom Hardy) force Batman out of exile and into a battle he may not be able to win.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Shawshank Redemption

AMC.HD.us2.title: Enemy of the State
AMC.HD.us2.description: Corrupt National Security Agency official Thomas Reynolds (Jon Voight) has a congressman assassinated to assure the passage of expansive new surveillance legislation. When a videotape of the murder ends up in the hands of Robert Clayton Dean (Will Smith), a labor lawyer and dedicated family man, he is framed for murder. With the help of ex-intelligence agent Edward "Brill" Lyle (Gene Hackman), Dean attempts to throw Reynolds off his trail and prove his innocence.

AMC.HD.us2.description: Is Xander a hero or a villain?; Duncan is ready to disrupt with P.I.N.A.T.A.; JoAnne contends with the consequences of her counsel; Anushka takes the lead and Martin has a decision to make; Gary gets to the root of Orson's strange behaviour.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Olympus Has Fallen
AMC.HD.us2.description: The unthinkable happens when heavily armed and highly trained terrorists launch a bold daytime attack on the White House. The building is overrun, and President Benjamin Asher (Aaron Eckhart) and his staff are taken hostage. Luckily for Asher, former presidential security officer Mike Banning (Gerard Butler) is on the scene. With time running out, it's up to Banning to locate Asher's son before the extremists do and rescue the president before his captors unleash their ultimate plan.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Three Little Beers
AMC.HD.us2.description: The trio tries golf.

AMC.HD.us2.title: First Blood
AMC.HD.us2.description: Vietnam veteran and drifter John J. Rambo wanders into a small Washington town in search of an old friend, but is met with intolerance and brutality by the local sheriff, Will Teasle. When Teasle and his deputies restrain and shave Rambo, he flashes back to his time as a prisoner of war and unleashes his fury on the officers. He narrowly escapes the manhunt, but it will take his former commander to save the hunters from the hunted.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Fury
AMC.HD.us2.description: In April 1945, the Allies are making their final push in the European theater. A battle-hardened Army sergeant named Don "Wardaddy" Collier, leading a Sherman tank and a five-man crew, undertakes a deadly mission behind enemy lines. Hopelessly outnumbered, outgunned and saddled with an inexperienced soldier in their midst, Wardaddy and his men face overwhelming odds as they move to strike at the heart of Nazi Germany.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Band of Brothers
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Currahee
AMC.HD.us2.description: A rivalry blazes between Lt. Sobel and a junior officer who has earned the respect of the men in Easy Company.

AMC.HD.us2.description: Thousands of paratroopers cross the English Channel to France on D-Day; Lt. Winters leads an attack on a fortified German artillery position.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Band of Brothers

AMC.HD.us2.title: Band of Brothers
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Replacements
AMC.HD.us2.description: A fresh group of paratroopers joins Easy Company shortly before it parachutes into German-occupied Holland; the company has to retreat when it meets a superior force.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Band of Brothers
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Crossroads
AMC.HD.us2.description: Winters leads a dangerous mission on a Dutch dike; although ill-equipped, Easy Company races to help hold the Allied line in the Ardennes Forest.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Band of Brothers

AMC.HD.us2.description: Easy Company spends Christmas in the trenches while trying to hold the line in the forest outside Bastogne, Belgium.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Band of Brothers
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: The Breaking Point
AMC.HD.us2.description: After taking Bastogne, Belgium, the company moves on to the town of Foy, where many lives are lost as a result of Lt. Dike's incompetence.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Band of Brothers
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: The Last Patrol
AMC.HD.us2.description: Lt. Jones leads a patrol across a river to take enemy prisoners, but the loss of a paratrooper leads Winters to refuse to send another patrol the next night.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Band of Brothers
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Why We Fight

AMC.HD.us2.title: Midway
AMC.HD.us2.description: On Dec. 7, 1941, Japanese forces launch a devastating attack on Pearl Harbor, the U.S. naval base in Hawaii. Six months later, the Battle of Midway commences on June 4, 1942, as the Japanese navy once again plans a strike against American ships in the Pacific. For the next three days, the U.S. Navy and a squad of brave fighter pilots engage the enemy in one of the most important and decisive battles of World War II.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Rambo
AMC.HD.us2.description: Having long-since abandoned his life as a lethal soldier, John Rambo (Sylvester Stallone) lives a solitary life near the Thai border. Two weeks after guiding a missionary (Julie Benz) and her comrades into Burma, he gets an urgent call for help. The missionaries have not returned and although he is reluctant to embrace violence again, Rambo sets out to rescue the captives from the Burmese army.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Midway
AMC.HD.us2.description: On Dec. 7, 1941, Japanese forces launch a devastating attack on Pearl Harbor, the U.S. naval base in Hawaii. Six months later, the Battle of Midway commences on June 4, 1942, as the Japanese navy once again plans a strike against American ships in the Pacific. For the next three days, the U.S. Navy and a squad of brave fighter pilots engage the enemy in one of the most important and decisive battles of World War II.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Fugitive
AMC.HD.us2.description: Wrongfully accused of murdering his wife, Richard Kimble escapes from the law in an attempt to find her killer and clear his name. Pursuing him is a team of U.S. marshals led by Deputy Samuel Gerard, a determined detective who will not rest until Richard is captured. As Richard leads the team through a series of intricate chases, he discovers the secrets behind his wife's death and struggles to expose the killer before it is too late.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Enemy of the State
AMC.HD.us2.description: Corrupt National Security Agency official Thomas Reynolds (Jon Voight) has a congressman assassinated to assure the passage of expansive new surveillance legislation. When a videotape of the murder ends up in the hands of Robert Clayton Dean (Will Smith), a labor lawyer and dedicated family man, he is framed for murder. With the help of ex-intelligence agent Edward "Brill" Lyle (Gene Hackman), Dean attempts to throw Reynolds off his trail and prove his innocence.

AMC.HD.us2.title: American Sniper
AMC.HD.us2.description: U.S. Navy SEAL Chris Kyle (Bradley Cooper) takes his sole mission -- protect his comrades -- to heart and becomes one of the most lethal snipers in American history. His pinpoint accuracy not only saves countless lives but also makes him a prime target of insurgents. Despite grave danger and his struggle to be a good husband and father to his family back in the States, Kyle serves four tours of duty in Iraq. However, when he finally returns home, he finds that he cannot leave the war behind.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Shawshank Redemption
AMC.HD.us2.description: Andy Dufresne (Tim Robbins) is sentenced to two consecutive life terms in prison for the murders of his wife and her lover and is sentenced to a tough prison. However, only Andy knows he didn't commit the crimes. While there, he forms a friendship with Red (Morgan Freeman), experiences brutality of prison life, adapts, helps the warden, etc., all in 19 years.

AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: We Watch. And We Are Always There
AMC.HD.us2.description: Guy is recruited to join a top-secret spy organization for the supernatural world; he must choose between his old life in the ordinary world and a new life as an undercover spy; Helen deals with trouble at the New York Mother House.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Talamasca: The Secret Order

AMC.HD.us2.title: Talamasca: The Secret Order

Swagger is coaxed back into service after high-profile government officials convince him to help thwart a plot against the President of the United States. Swagger realizes he has been betrayed and becomes the target of a nationwide manhunt. Instead of hiding, he seeks revenge against some of the most powerful and corrupt leaders in the free world.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Perfect Storm
AMC.HD.us2.description: Based on a true story, the film tells of the courageous men and women who risk their lives every working day, pitting their fishing boats and rescue vessels against the capricious forces of nature. Their worst fears are realized at sea on Halloween of 1991, when they are confronted by three raging weather fronts which unexpectedly collide to produce the greatest, fiercest storm in modern history -- "The Perfect Storm.".

Además, Ángel está obsesionado con ser parte de las pruebas de medicamentos que hacen las farmacéuticas. Vive de eso y lo ha sufrido porque perdió su erección en uno de los estudios.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Diego pierde su trabajo y decide hipotecar su casa para montar un negocio. Su esposa no está muy de acuerdo ya que le preocupa perderlo todo ahora que está embarazada.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Los sugar también tenemos corazón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Juan no quiere que su hermana Rebeca se entrometa en su vida, ella le reclama porque busca mujeres mucho más jóvenes que él, les da dinero y luego le son infieles, incluso hasta con su hijo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Alquilé mi vientre, pero me enamoré
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Edgar vive con su novia y, de común acuerdo, le propone a Carmen embarazarla a cambio de dinero. Ahora ella quiere convertirse en su esposa y lo presiona con la posibilidad de perder al bebé.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mensaje fatal; El golazo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lorena demanda a Claudia por tenderle una trampa que pone en peligro su asilo. Amanda se enamora del hijo de su amante, y tienen un bebé juntos, pero ahora la abuela no reconoce a su nieto.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Devuélveme mi pene; Millonario part time
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Pía culpa a su sicóloga, también transgénero, de haberla manipulado para cambiarse de sexo. Anselmo se hace pasar por millonario para enamorar a Claudia, quien es rica, por eso lo despiden.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La crie y me acusa con su papá
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Víctor se hace cargo de su hijastra Fátima desde niña. La relación se deteriora porque asegura que la tienen como una criada. Esto provoca una batalla entre su papá biológico y su padrastro.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Diego en las garras de Circe
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Circe sigue pensando que Diego está bajo su control e intenta seducirlo, pero algo se le sale de las manos. Joselito cae en manos de los federales y Gavino pide su cabeza. Arrestan a Jim.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Familia en deportación; Abuela momia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Álvaro y su familia viven una tragedia migratoria, la esposa tiene orden de deportación y él quiere hacer algo. Por otro lado, Alex encuentra una momia, le toma fotos y las usa para publicidad.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Taxi al secuestro; Efecto invernadero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gloria es taxista y la acusan de secuestro, por un malentendido llevó al bebé a la "guardería". Lili y Rebeca se enfrentan por la custodia de su hija y también por los derechos de un cóctel.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial soltera codiciada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de policías
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de danzas polinesias
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de adolescentes
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El amor de una madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rubén abandona a Paula y a sus hijos, así que le toca a ella asumir toda la responsabilidad. Sin embargo, él regresa lleno de malas intenciones y quiere llevarse a los niños.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Alquilé mi vientre, pero me enamoré
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Edgar vive con su novia y, de común acuerdo, le propone a Carmen embarazarla a cambio de dinero. Ahora ella quiere convertirse en su esposa y lo presiona con la posibilidad de perder al bebé.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Dinero de menores; Boda iluminada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Andrea quiere que Juan Carlos la indemnice porque fue prostituida durante un viaje en barco. Rossi desea casarse con un vestido lleno de luces, su esposo tiene fotofobia y quiere el divorcio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Atención medica y sexual urgente; Café de elefante
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jeanlin descubre que su "roommate" se prostituye y quiere desalojarla. José demanda a Elvys porque no le pagó el café que le sirvió en su reunión de negocios, y cuyo grano lo defeca un animal.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: No es Daniel, es el Dany
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Aconsejado por una vidente, Daniel pide una visa para cumplir su sueño de trabajar en Estados Unidos. Un engaño lo lleva a despreciar todo lo que tenía y arrepentirse es su única salida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Regresa a mi lado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Amelia descubre que su familia le ocultó que su hijo fue condenado a pena de muerte. Ella le suplica a la virgen un milagro para que él vuelva a su lado, porque está segura de que es inocente.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Justicia divina
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Bruno, uno de los jefes de Mauricio, quiere quedarse con la esposa de su empleado. Decide acusarlo de robo y enviarlo a la cárcel, pero los ruegos de Aurelia ante la virgen son respondidos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Magdalena: Con derecho a cumplir mis sueños
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Magdalena vive para apoyar económicamente a sus hijos adultos. Sofía, su vecina, perdió la confianza tras su divorcio. Ambas se proponen apoyarse para superar los conflictos que las agobian.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Aleida y Susy: Enemigo en casa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La vida de Aleida cambia cuando deja a su hija Susy con una vecina. Poco después, las señales de abuso son claras y, aunque ella sospecha de su novio, el responsable es el hijo de la cuidadora.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Diego en las garras de Circe
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Circe sigue pensando que Diego está bajo su control e intenta seducirlo, pero algo se le sale de las manos. Joselito cae en manos de los federales y Gavino pide su cabeza. Arrestan a Jim.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Duelo universitario
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Los primos Nancy y Adrián intentan duplicar todos sus premios al jugar a trapitos al sol. Los esposos Adriana y Omar enfrentan el desafío de la foca con la esperanza de llevarse muchos premios.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: ADN
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Eduardo sabe que tiene un asunto pendiente que nunca enfrentó como debía. Ahora, se ve forzado a tomar riesgos y, contra reloj, resolver una situación compleja que afecta a sus seres queridos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La crie y me acusa con su papá
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Víctor se hace cargo de su hijastra Fátima desde niña. La relación se deteriora porque asegura que la tienen como una criada. Esto provoca una batalla entre su papá biológico y su padrastro.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Ya lo agarraron de su puerquito
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tania exige que dejen en paz a su esposo, pero su suegra le reclama pagar caprichos familiares.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hora de separarse;El mismo derecho
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ella quiere volver a Venezuela para cuidar de su hija y que su esposo se quede en EE.UU. con el niño. Una pareja duda si pagar el rescate de su niña o usar el dinero en la operación de su hijo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Papá homofóbico; Muerte forzada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Trajo a su hijo a vivir con él, ahora el chico sufre las torturas del padre, quien no acepta su orientación sexual. Cayó en depresión por la infidelidad de su esposo y la dan por muerta.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La novia de mis hijos es una conchuda
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hablar de los problemas es el primer paso para superarlos y, por eso, Rocío trae un programa único para hablar de las preocupaciones de cada día y, en conjunto, encontrar una solución.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Ayuda necesaria
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mientras los federales trasladan a Joselito, caen en una emboscada. Mateo quiere mostrar su lealtad a Gavino y promete entregarle la cabeza de quien lo traccionó. Circe sospecha de Diego.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cindi y la piñata; La jefa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Demanda a la mamá de la niña que, con el palo de una piñata, dejó a su hija sin dientes. Vanessa y Verónica quieren desalojar a Marta, su madre, por imponer severas reglas a los niños.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Pintando con los ojos; La soprano asesina
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dice ser el famoso pintor argentino, Leandro Granato, pero es una farsa, su mujer quiere el divorcio. Lucía demanda al organizador del evento donde ella actuó, y fue atacada por un invitado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de época
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: En un viaje al pasado, los participantes compiten para encontrar a la pareja ideal, al estilo de la época antigua.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de geisha vs. ninjas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Los participantes están listos para aprender a jugar, a conocerse y a seducir al sexo contrario, en este capítulo especial en el que simulan ser geishas y ninjas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Marcianos vs. venusianas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: ¿Será cierto que los hombres son de Marte y las mujeres son de Venus? Los concursantes intentarán responderlo mientras buscan a la pareja ideal.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de gogo dancers
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El último beso
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El amante de Cecilia quiere eliminar a Leonardo, quien está a punto de descubrir el robo al hospital. Alicia pide con fe la intercesión de la virgen y toda la verdad sale a luz.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Ya lo agarraron de su puerquito
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tania exige que dejen en paz a su esposo, pero su suegra le reclama pagar caprichos familiares.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Rebelde sin causa; Excremento congelado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Anayansi desea recuperar la custodia de su hijo, pero la abuela se rehúsa. También, la hija de Cristian y Andrea tiene una enfermedad gastrointestinal que están tratando con excremento.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Erizo mortal; La cantante
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniel come un pez globo, muy venenoso y cae en coma, ahora demanda al restaurante donde lo consumió. Ambas son cantantes, pero Aylinne usa su trabajo para traficar droga, y acusan a Bella.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Volver a empezar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Moisés atropella a un niño y termina en la cárcel. Tras ser liberado, quiere volver a empezar, pero todos lo rechazan hasta que se cruza con doña Chavela, con quien comparte la misma pena.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Un sueño añorado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Catalina se siente destruida porque no puede ser madre y pierde a su esposo Rodrigo en un accidente de auto. El dolor se convierte en alegría cuando no uno, sino dos bebés llegan a su vida para cumplir su sueño.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cuentas por cobrar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rafael es un hombre muy bueno y dueño de una carpintería. Pero a su alrededor solo tiene a gente falsa que lo quiere ver caer. Con mucha fe, él podrá solucionar los problemas y las deudas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sara: Detrás de una cortina rasgada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sara es secuestrada por sus nanas, quienes ocultan sus verdaderos nombres, para convertirla en esclava. Daniel, el hermano de la víctima, lo vio todo, pero guarda silencio para protegerse.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Rosa: Una guerrera invencible
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rosa es una exitosa influencer que acaba de comprometer y al sentirse cansada, acude al médico y sus estudios determinan que tiene cáncer de mama.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Ayuda necesaria
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mientras los federales trasladan a Joselito, caen en una emboscada. Mateo quiere mostrar su lealtad a Gavino y promete entregarle la cabeza de quien lo traccionó. Circe sospecha de Diego.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Un dinero para la cirugía
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Elizabeth compite por el premio en efectivo para la operación de su esposo junto con su yerno, César. Araceli y Nicole juegan a "Rescatando a la princesa" para poder llevarse un auto.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Bendecidas y afortunadas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Las hermanas Karol y Andrea se ganan la vida de una forma peculiar y poco honesta. La muerte se presenta ante Karol, quien tiene el tiempo contado para enmendar lo que la atormenta.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La novia de mis hijos es una conchuda
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hablar de los problemas es el primer paso para superarlos y, por eso, Rocío trae un programa único para hablar de las preocupaciones de cada día y, en conjunto, encontrar una solución.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Si saben cómo soy para que andan conmigo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Esmeralda rechaza la relación de su hija con un mujeriego, él acusa a su suegra de ser alcohólica.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Amish; Canta en español
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Claudia es evangélica y Jorge, es amish, él quiere la custodia de su hijo para llevárselo. Jay Mula es un dominicano que rapea en inglés sin mucho éxito, pero se niega a cantar en español.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Esposo desaparecido; Tierra maldita
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tebelio desaparece al viajar en balsa hacia Estados Unidos, lo dan por muerto, pero está vivo. Antonio le compra a María unas tierras en Colombia que resultaron ser de un capo de la droga.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Anda de galán, pero no cuida a su hija
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Roberto acusa a su hija Celia y a su exyerno, Cristian, de abandonar a su propia hija enferma de tres años para dedicarse a otros noviazgos. Ahora son los abuelos quienes cuidan a la pequeña.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sin escape
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Llega la hora de que Gavino ajuste cuentas con Joselito para que pague por su deslealtad. El capo lo hace sufrir al máximo y disfruta su destrucción. Nuria pasa por un momento traumático.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Enano meme; El primer amor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gleiber sufre las consecuencias de las caricaturas mal intencionadas de Jorge. En otro caso, Jenny quiere cumplir el último deseo de su hija de 12 años, antes de que la niña muera de cáncer.

Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.description: Programa donde la pasión y la controversia reinan mientras se debaten los últimos hechos ocurridos en el fútbol mexicano, la Copa Mundial de la FIFA, la UEFA Champions League y todas las competencias más importantes a nivel mundial.

Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.title: El gran show del fútbol
Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.subtitle: Ronaldo
Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.description: Se recurre a la turbulenta carrera de uno de los mejores jugadores de la historia. Luego estaba Ferenc Puskás en 1954, quien, tras una polémica lesión, no pudo llevar a Hungría a la gloria en Suiza.

Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.title: El gran show del fútbol
Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.subtitle: Lionel Messi
Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.description: Liderar a Argentina hacia la gloria en la Copa del Mundo de 2022 consolidó la posición de Lionel Messi como el mejor futbolista de la historia.

Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.title: Live: Total Sports 360
Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial
Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.description: Cobertura de las noticias del mundo deportivo. Información actualizada de lo que ocurre en los principales deportes a nivel mundial como NFL, NBA, MLB, Liga MX, MLS, ligas europeas de fútbol, boxeo, NASCAR, F1 y la Copa Mundial de la FIFA.

Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.title: Live: The 110th Running of the Indianapolis 500
Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.description: La centésima décima edición de uno de los eventos de automovilismo con más tradición de Estados Unidos. El Indianapolis Motor Speedway, en Indiana, acoge la carrera de 500 millas, en la que Mick Schumacher hace su debut.

Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.title: Live: Fútbol Argentino Primera División
Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.description: River Plate se enfrenta a Belgrano en la final del Torneo Apertura. El Pirata llega a su primera final en Primera División, mientras que El Millonario busca revancha de aquella final del 2011 que lo mandó al descenso.

Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.title: Fútbol Serie A
Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.description: Acción de la jornada 38 de la Serie A 2025-26. Milán busca asegurar Champions League y Cagliari cerrar con dos victorias al hilo.

Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.title: Live: Fútbol MLS
Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.description: Toda la acción de la temporada regular 2026 de la MLS. Inter Miami se enfrenta a Philadelphia Union. Desde el Nu Stadium, en Miami, Florida.

Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.title: Live: Fútbol MLS
Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.description: Toda la acción de la temporada regular 2026 de la MLS. LAFC se enfrenta a Seattle Sounders FC. Desde el BMO Stadium, en Los Ángeles, California.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Tras la disputa de los encuentros, es tiempo para el análisis. Los entrenadores de los equipos de LaLiga HyperMotion desmenuzan las claves que, según ellos, han propiciado el resultado del partido que acaban de jugar.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LaLiga
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Villarreal-Atlético de Madrid
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los mejores clubes del país protagonizan LaLiga, el campeonato de la regularidad del fútbol español. El torneo es una carrera de fondo en la que los equipos pelean por sus metas: la salvación, Europa, la Champions o el título. El Barcelona defiende corona.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: El post de la jornada
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Villarreal-Atlético de Madrid
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Tras la disputa de los encuentros, es tiempo para el análisis. Este espacio desmenuza los partidos con las mejores imágenes, intenta esclarecer las polémicas y da la palabra a los que han sido los protagonistas sobre el césped.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Mirandés - Granada
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: CD Mirandés quiere hacerse fuerte en casa desde el control del ritmo y la amplitud, buscando ventajas en tres cuartos sin perder equilibrio en la pérdida. Granada CF intentará sostener un partido largo y competitivo en la categoría: orden, ayudas constantes y castigo en transición o estrategia cuando encuentre ventaja. Los detalles en las áreas marcarán el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Cultural - Burgos
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Cultural y Deportiva Leonesa quiere hacerse fuerte en casa desde el control del ritmo y la amplitud, buscando ventajas en tres cuartos sin perder equilibrio en la pérdida. Burgos CF intentará sostener un partido largo y competitivo en la categoría: orden, ayudas constantes y castigo en transición o estrategia cuando encuentre ventaja. Los detalles en las áreas marcarán el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Huesca - Castellón
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Alcoraz exige duelos y concentración: el Huesca buscará un partido sobrio, con bloque compacto y mucha vigilancia a la espalda. El Castellón quiere sostener su ambición en la zona alta con continuidad y centros tensos; si controla la pérdida y domina segundas jugadas, tendrá ventaja en un choque de alta fricción.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Inside - El gran derbi
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Un recorrido por la organización de El Gran Derbi de Sevilla y el impacto de la piratería audiovisual.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Eibar - Córdoba
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Ipurua suele elevar el voltaje: el Eibar buscará ritmo alto, agresividad tras pérdida y centros laterales para castigar en el área. El Córdoba llega con confianza para discutir el guion: orden, salidas verticales y presencia en segunda línea. Si controla transiciones, puede convertirlo en un partido de detalles.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Sporting - Almería
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Molinón empuja: el Sporting quiere iniciativa, presión alta por tramos y carga del área desde los costados para convertir el empuje en ocasiones. El Almería llega con ambición de zona alta: ritmo por dentro, llegadas constantes y atención a la transición defensiva. Si gana las áreas, puede marcar diferencias.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Las Palmas - Zaragoza
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Las Palmas afronta la jornada con ambición en la zona alta: control con balón, paciencia y aceleración en el último tercio para convertir el Gran Canaria en impulso. El Zaragoza, con la permanencia como hoja de ruta, necesita un partido sobrio y eficaz: proteger su área, competir rechaces y elegir bien los momentos para salir. En un duelo así, el primer golpe cambia el escenario.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Málaga - Racing
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La Rosaleda acoge un pulso de alta exigencia: el Málaga quiere sostener su candidatura en la zona alta desde la intensidad y la presión tras pérdida, con llegada por bandas. El Racing llega con el objetivo de mantenerse arriba y administrar momentos: si gana segundas jugadas y domina el área, tendrá ventaja. Partido de márgenes mínimos, con estrategia como llave.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Cádiz - Leganés
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Nuevo Mirandilla pide oficio: el Cádiz buscará un partido de control emocional, sin concesiones, y con centros tensos para vivir cerca del área rival. El Leganés necesita puntuar en la pelea por la permanencia: bloque junto, área protegida y máxima atención a los rechaces. Si sostiene el 0-0, podrá crecer con estrategia y transiciones.

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Eredivisie
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Ajax Amsterdam – FC Utrecht (Europa-Playoffs, Finale)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: In der höchsten Spielklasse des niederländischen Fußballs treten 18 Mannschaften an 34 Spieltagen gegeneinander an. Dabei dominieren die Vereine Ajax Amsterdam, PSV Eindhoven und Feyenoord Rotterdam. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: CA River Plate – Belgrano (Finale)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Vorhang auf zur höchsten Spielklasse des argentinischen Fußballs: Die Primera División wurde 1985 als Nachfolger des Campeonato de Primera División und des Torneo Metropolitano gegründet. 24 Vereine sind in der Liga vertreten. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Brasilianer spielen den attraktivsten Fußball. Will man die Pelés von morgen sehen, lohnt sich ein Blick auf die nationale Meisterschaft. Die Sendung zeigt die wichtigsten Spiele der aktuellen Saison. (Senderinfo).

unifi.spotv.my.description: A magazine show following the fortunes of an individual team at each round, featuring the conflict and camaraderie as pilots and owners bid to become Champions of the Water.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Allen vs. Costa - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The action returns to Meta APEX in Las Vegas on May 17 with a fight card topped by a featherweight clash between “Almighty” Arnold Allen and Melquizael “The Dalmatian” Costa. A staple in the Top 10 aiming to defend his ground, Allen looks to rebound after a narrow decision loss to Jean Silva at UFC 324 and display the form that produced 10 straight wins to open his UFC tenure. One of the hottest fighters on the roster, Costa pushed his winning streak to six in February with a first-round stoppage win over veteran Dan Ige.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: BUNDESLIGA 60 YEARS RECORDS COMPILATION - BUNDESLIGA 60 YEARS RECORDS COMPILATION
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Goals, saves and other superhuman feats that have graced the Bundesliga. Since inception in 1963, who stands atop the Bundesliga charts?

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC 328: Chimaev vs. Strickland - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Two titles are on the line when UFC returns to Prudential Center in Newark, New Jersey on Saturday, May 10 for UFC 328. In the main event, undefeated champion Khamzat Chimaev defends the middleweight title for the first time since winning it last August in a clash with former titleholder Sean Strickland. In the co-main event, flyweight champion Joshua “The Fearless” Van defends his title against Japanese contender Tatsuro “The Best” Taira in the first UFC championship fight between competitors born in the 21st century.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 2
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 9
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: BUNDESLIGA 60 YEARS RECORDS COMPILATION - BUNDESLIGA 60 YEARS RECORDS COMPILATION
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Goals, saves and other superhuman feats that have graced the Bundesliga. Since inception in 1963, who stands atop the Bundesliga charts?

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Allen vs. Costa - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The action returns to Meta APEX in Las Vegas on May 17 with a fight card topped by a featherweight clash between “Almighty” Arnold Allen and Melquizael “The Dalmatian” Costa. A staple in the Top 10 aiming to defend his ground, Allen looks to rebound after a narrow decision loss to Jean Silva at UFC 324 and display the form that produced 10 straight wins to open his UFC tenure. One of the hottest fighters on the roster, Costa pushed his winning streak to six in February with a first-round stoppage win over veteran Dan Ige.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: BUNDESLIGA 60 YEARS RECORDS COMPILATION - BUNDESLIGA 60 YEARS RECORDS COMPILATION
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Goals, saves and other superhuman feats that have graced the Bundesliga. Since inception in 1963, who stands atop the Bundesliga charts?

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC 328: Chimaev vs. Strickland - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Two titles are on the line when UFC returns to Prudential Center in Newark, New Jersey on Saturday, May 10 for UFC 328. In the main event, undefeated champion Khamzat Chimaev defends the middleweight title for the first time since winning it last August in a clash with former titleholder Sean Strickland. In the co-main event, flyweight champion Joshua “The Fearless” Van defends his title against Japanese contender Tatsuro “The Best” Taira in the first UFC championship fight between competitors born in the 21st century.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: TM ISTAF World Cup 2026 - FINAL - MALAYSIA vs THAILAND - (TEAM)
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The ISTAF Sepaktakraw World Cup 2026 marks the official return of the Sepaktakraw World Cup to Malaysia, reaffirming the nation’s historic and enduring role in the global development of the sport. This prestigious championship will be held from 16 to 23 May 2026 in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Goals, saves and other superhuman feats that have graced the Bundesliga. Since inception in 1963, who stands atop the Bundesliga charts?

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: TM ISTAF World Cup 2026 - FINAL - INDIA vs MALAYSIA - (QUADRANT)
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The ISTAF Sepaktakraw World Cup 2026 marks the official return of the Sepaktakraw World Cup to Malaysia, reaffirming the nation’s historic and enduring role in the global development of the sport. This prestigious championship will be held from 16 to 23 May 2026 in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 3
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 10
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Flashback - UFC Fight Flashback 1001 "Volkanovski vs Ortega
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: At UFC 266, The Ultimate Fighter coaching rivalry between featherweight champion Alexander Volkanovski and Brian Ortega came to a head. Relive the action like never before with enhanced replays and angles, new footage, and exclusive audio.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 318: Holloway vs Poirier 3
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: It's a memorable night in New Orleans, Louisiana, when Lafayette native Dustin Poirier makes his final walk to the Octagon, hoping to go three for three against Max Holloway, with the BMF title on the line. This one for the history books and much more on UFC Reloaded

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Ultimate Knockouts - 1004 - Ultimate Knockouts 30 Years of Knockouts
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC Ultimate Knockouts brings you the best knockouts in the UFC's 30-year history.
